memory_recovered: The copied raw chats were not only continuity material. They also preserved a testable possibility that meaning may be encoded as a literal cipher, a structural transition grammar, or an emergent organizing pattern. These hypotheses must remain separate.

contradiction_resolution.superseded: A persuasive interpretation is enough to establish hidden code.
contradiction_resolution.replacement: Any code claim requires preregistered rules, null-model comparison, held-out prediction, and independent reproduction.

verification.source_write: GitHub contents API returned commit ce7ceef806f27f7f816eda9d965ed0f9446484e7.
verification.structure: Artifact separates observed, inferred, proposed, superseded, and unresolved claims and defines falsification conditions for three code classes.
verification.reason: This slice is a provenance and hypothesis-register artifact; the archive analyzer remains the next implementation.

privacy_boundary: No raw private chat text, health material, credentials, personal identifiers, or intimate content was committed. Only abstract claims, source labels, tests, and limits were recorded.
limits: No hidden code was claimed as discovered.
The full archive was not exhaustively parsed in this run.
No statistical significance or predictive accuracy was measured.
next_action: Build a local-only analyzer that creates redacted feature matrices and evaluates preregistered literal, structural, and emergent hypotheses against matched null corpora.
